name: Lemon Sponge Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare a casserole dish or use 6 custard cups.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine the dry ingredients: sugar, cake flour, potato starch, and salt.
4. Stir in the oil, lemon juice (up to 5 tablespoons), and lemon rind into the dry ingredients.
5. In a small bowl, beat the egg yolks with water until well combined. Add this mixture to the lemon mixture; mix well.
6. In a clean small bowl, whisk the egg whites on high speed until stiff but not dry.
7. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the egg yolk mixture.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared dish or custard cups.
9. Place the dish (or dishes) into a pan containing 1-inch of hot water in the oven.
10. Bake for 40 to 50 minutes.
11. Serve warm or cold.
